name: Killer Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the loaf in half horizontally.
2. Butter the cut sides of both halves and toast under the broiler until lightly browned.
3. Mix the remaining ingredients and spread over both halves, using the entire mixture.
4. Bake at 400°F for 15 to 20 minutes, until the top is brown and puffed.
5. Cut into wedges and serve hot.
CAROLE'S NOTE: If fresh basil and oregano are available, it will make a powerful difference. Use triple the amount of each when using fresh herbs.
